objectSets.name: Set 1 — Readonly parents for FK resolution, then PFDR + PFS Upsert

objects.query: SELECT StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT Name FROM FulfillmentStepDefinitionGroup ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT DestinationProductId, Id, Name, Priority, SourceClassIdentifier, SourceIdentifier, SourceProductClassificationId, SourceProductId FROM ProductFulfillmentDecompRule ORDER BY SourceProduct.StockKeepingUnit ASC, DestinationProduct.StockKeepingUnit ASC

SELECT Action, FulfillmentProcessId, FulfillmentStepDefnGroupId, Id, Name, ProductClassificationId, ProductId, SourceClassIdentifier, SourceIdentifier, Type FROM ProductFulfillmentScenario ORDER BY Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, FulfillmentStepDefnGroup.Name ASC

objectSets.name: Set 2 — Update Product2 DecompositionScope (customer SKUs only)

objects.query: SELECT CustomDecompositionScope, DecompositionScope, FulfillmentQtyCalcMethod, Name, StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
